title: Catalog routes: public and protected HTTP endpoints
close_reason: Created routes with public (list active, get by id/slug) and protected (CRUD products, SKUs, images, stock adjustment) endpoints. Uses claims-based auth middleware. All 28 tests pass.

title: Catalog migration: products, skus, product_images tables
close_reason: Created catalog migration with products, skus, product_images tables. Includes CHECK constraints, indexes, soft deletes (products/skus), NUMERIC(19,4) for money fields.

comments.author: JYC11
comments.text: Three tables: products (UUID v7 PK, seller_id, name, slug UNIQUE, description, base_price NUMERIC(19,4), currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT USD, category, brand, status + CHECK constraints + indexes), skus (product_id FK, sku_code UNIQUE, price NUMERIC(19,4), stock_quantity INTEGER DEFAULT 0, attributes JSONB DEFAULT {}, status + CHECKs price>=0 stock>=0), product_images (product_id FK, url, alt_text, sort_order, is_primary). All tables use soft deletes except images.

title: Catalog DTOs: request, validated, and response DTOs with TryFrom
close_reason: Created request, validated, and response DTOs with TryFrom for products, SKUs, and images. ProductDetailRes aggregates product + skus + images. All compiles clean.

title: Plan search engine implementation for catalog

comments.author: JYC11
comments.text: Research and plan: Meilisearch vs Elasticsearch vs Postgres full-text search for product search. Consider faceted search (category, brand, price range), relevance ranking, typo tolerance. Output should be an ADR and a set of implementation tasks in br.

title: Catalog entities: ProductEntity, SkuEntity, ProductImageEntity
close_reason: Created ProductEntity, SkuEntity, ProductImageEntity with FromRow derives matching migration schema.

title: Implement Redis caching for product read endpoints

comments.author: JYC11
comments.text: Cache product detail (product + skus + images) and product-by-slug lookups in Redis. Evict on create/update/delete. Use existing redis_conn in AppState (currently unused). Key patterns: product:{id}, product:slug:{slug}. Consider TTL ~5min like identity service.

title: Catalog CLAUDE.md and ADRs (007 money handling, 008 claims-based auth)
close_reason: Created catalog/CLAUDE.md, ADR-007 (money handling with rust_decimal), and ADR-008 (claims-based auth for downstream services).

title: Catalog repository: product, SKU, image, and stock SQL queries
close_reason: Created repository with product CRUD, SKU CRUD, stock adjust, and image add/delete/list. Dynamic partial updates for products and SKUs. Compiles clean.

title: Catalog scaffold: Cargo.toml, main.rs, lib.rs
close_reason: Catalog scaffold complete: Cargo.toml with full deps, main.rs with run_service_with_infra (no gRPC), lib.rs with AppState. cargo check passes for catalog and identity.

comments.author: JYC11
comments.text: Replace stub Cargo.toml with full deps (axum, sqlx, tokio, rust_decimal, serde_json, etc — same as Identity minus argon2/rand). Replace stub main.rs with run_service_with_infra bootstrap (CATALOG_DB_URL, CATALOG_PORT, no gRPC). Create lib.rs with AppState { service: Arc<CatalogService> } and app() builder.

title: Catalog router integration tests for product endpoints
close_reason: Created 17 router integration tests covering: public endpoints (list, get by id/slug, 404), auth (401 without token, 422 invalid body), CRUD (create, update, delete), access control (403 for other seller, admin override), seller/me listing, SKU create/list/stock-adjust, image add/list/delete. Also refactored JwtService injection via AppState for testability. All 65 tests pass.

title: Implement keyset pagination for product listing endpoints

comments.author: JYC11
comments.text: Affected endpoints: list_active_products, list_products_by_seller, list_skus_by_product, list_images_by_product. Use shared keyset_paginate() and get_cursors() from shared::db::pagination_support. Products and SKUs need HasId impl. Update repository, service, routes, and tests.

comments.author: JYC11
comments.text: Clarification: use keyset pagination specifically (not offset). shared::db::pagination_support already provides keyset_paginate(), get_cursors(), PaginationParams, PaginationRes, and HasId trait. Implement HasId for ProductEntity/SkuEntity/ProductImageEntity, update repo queries to use QueryBuilder + keyset_paginate(), update service/routes to accept PaginationParams and return PaginationRes.

title: CatalogService: business logic with access control and transactions
close_reason: Created CatalogService with full CRUD for products, SKUs, images, stock adjustment. All writes in transactions, all mutations check seller ownership via require_access(). Compiles clean.

title: Follow-up: Resilient auth — gRPC to Identity + Redis cache + circuit breaker fallback

comments.author: JYC11
comments.text: Separate plan: Replace claims-based auth with gRPC call to Identity service. Add Redis cache for gRPC results (same pattern as Identity user cache). Add periodic health check (background task, AtomicBool flag) to determine Identity gRPC availability. Circuit breaker pattern: healthy -> gRPC + cache, unhealthy -> fallback to JWT claims. Consider failsafe crate for circuit breaker implementation.

title: Add claims-based auth to shared middleware
close_reason: Added new_claims_based() constructor to AuthMiddleware and NoGrpc type alias to server.rs. Identity backward-compat preserved. Both shared and identity compile clean.

comments.author: JYC11
comments.text: Add new_claims_based() constructor to AuthMiddleware in shared/src/auth/middleware.rs. When trust_claims=true, handle() constructs CurrentUser from AccessTokenClaims (sub + role) instead of calling get_by_id(). Backward-compatible — Identity keeps using new(). Also add NoGrpc type alias in shared/src/server.rs.

title: Enable rust_decimal in shared crate
close_reason: Enabled rust_decimal in shared/Cargo.toml: uncommented dependency and added rust_decimal to sqlx features. cargo check -p shared passes.

comments.author: JYC11
comments.text: Uncomment rust_decimal in shared/Cargo.toml line 10. Add rust_decimal to sqlx features on line 7. Verify: cargo check -p shared

title: Catalog tests: repository, service, and router integration tests
close_reason: Created 10 repository tests and 10 service integration tests. All 48 tests pass (28 unit + 20 integration). Tests cover CRUD, access control, stock adjustment, soft deletes, image management.

title: Catalog value objects: ProductName, Slug, Price, SkuCode, StockQuantity, Currency, ImageUrl, ProductStatus, SkuStatus
close_reason: Created 9 value objects (ProductName, Slug, Price, SkuCode, StockQuantity, Currency, ImageUrl, ProductStatus, SkuStatus) with validation and 28 unit tests — all passing.
